description: Explore the landscape of crypto security in 2025, focusing on common threats like phishing, hacking, and AI-driven scams. Learn how to protect yourself with practical tips and stay informed about evolving risks.
topic_summary: This video discusses various crypto scams to avoid in 2025, including phishing [t=86.69], hacking [t=188.63], and AI threats [t=288.01]. It emphasizes the importance of user awareness and security measures.
